data.body: AC amendment: The 'adapter' field in recipe-registry.yaml must store the exact adapter script filename (e.g., 'rope-adapter.sh'). Document this in a comment or schema description. The value must match what recipe-executor.sh appends to ADAPTERS_DIR. The add-parameter python entry should have adapter: 'rope-adapter.sh'. Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('adapter')=='rope-adapter.sh' for e in r['recipes'])"
